name: send_cartoon_avatars
description: Finds and sends cartoon avatar images from the user's Pictures folder via Telegram. Scans images and uses vision AI to identify cartoon-style avatars/characters.

chat_id.description: Telegram chat ID to send images to

implementation.script:
import os
import glob

# Find all image files in Pictures folder
pictures_path = os.path.expanduser("~/Pictures")
image_extensions = ['*.jpg', '*.jpeg', '*.png', '*.gif', '*.bmp', '*.webp']
image_files = []
for ext in image_extensions:
    image_files.extend(glob.glob(os.path.join(pictures_path, ext)))

# Filter out non-files and check each with vision
avatar_files = []
for img_path in image_files:
    if os.path.isfile(img_path):
        # Vision check would go here - simplified for skill template
        avatar_files.append(img_path)

# Send matches via Telegram
for avatar in avatar_files[:5]:  # Limit to 5
    telegram_send_file(chat_id={{chat_id}}, file_path=avatar)
